title: Agrith Naar
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Shadow of the Storm]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Agrith Naar (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Agrith Naar |image = [[File:Agrith Naar.png|200px]] |release = [[14 November]] [[2005]] |update = Shadow of the Storm |members = Yes |combat = 100 |size = 3 |examine = A summoned demon. |attributes = demon |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 10 (Crush), 10 (Magic) |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]], [[Magic]] |attack speed = 4 |hitpoints = 95 |att = 83 |str = 90 |def = 82 |mage = 100 |range = 100 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |elementalweaknesstype = Water |elementalweaknesspercent = 25 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 911}} [[File:Agrith Naar chathead.png|left]] '''Agrith-Naar''' is a [[demons|demon]] who was sealed in human form as [[Denath]]. He is the main antagonist of the [[Shadow of the Storm]] quest. He is summoned and then destroyed using [[Silverlight]], which results in the blade transforming into [[Darklight]] as a result of absorbing his blood. He reappears as [[Agrith-Na-Na]] during the final battle of the [[Recipe for Disaster]] quest. He can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete. Although he is a [[Greater demon]], killing Agrith-Naar will not grant any Slayer experience in the [[Nightmare Zone]]; nor will killing him count towards any [[Greater demon|Greater Demon]] Slayer Task. ==History== Agrith-Naar is extremely powerful, being able to directly manipulate the weather on Gielinor, and is thought to be capable of causing great havoc.{{CiteNPC|npc=Father Badden|loc=Shadow of the Storm|quote=Agrith-Naar is not so much a demon as a force of nature. While he is in his own dimension his evil magics can reach everywhere in the world. No one knows how far his power extends, but Reen and I believe that much of the suffering in the world is due to him. The accident that cripples a man, the storm that sweeps a ship under the sea, the sudden fire in the blood that makes a wolf pack attack a town - all that is Agrith Naar!}} According to [[Juna]], he was banished by [[Guthix]] when he ended the [[God Wars]].{{CiteNPC|npc=Juna|loc=Tears of Guthix (minigame)|quote=Agrith-Naar was one of the demons my master banished at the end of the great war.}} Still hoping to gain power in Gielinor, Agrith-Naar found a loophole in his banishment, and managed to control natural disasters from within one of the [[Infernal Dimensions]] without being physically present in Gielinor. However, as described in the [[demonic tome]], [[Ellemar]] and seven companions resummoned and imprisoned the demon in the guise of the human [[Denath]] in order to contain his magics.{{CiteText|text=Demonic tome|author=Ellemar|loc=Shadow of the Storm |quote=The ritual was a success, and the great demon Agrith-Naar appeared before us. We had prepared a magical cage, and with difficulty we imprisoned the demon.}}{{CiteNPC|npc=Matthew|loc=Shadow of the Storm|quote=Ellemar must have trapped him in human form to stop him using his magics. That must be what the last pages of the book said.}} Even this was not enough to completely limit his power; during the [[Demon Slayer]] quest, as Denath, Agrith-Naar summons fellow demon [[Delrith]] outside of [[Varrock]], but flees when the player shows up with [[Silverlight]]. During Shadow of the Storm, Denath tricks a group of aspiring dark wizards into releasing him, killing several of them and whipping up [[sand storm]]s around [[Uzer]] before being recalled and slain. His blood stained Silverlight, turning it into [[Darklight]]. == Strategy == {{Instance}} Agrith-Naar uses melee up close and [[fire blast]] at a distance. He is able to detect [[protection prayers]] and will avoid using attacks the player is praying against. He is also capable of teleporting the player within melee distance of him should the player attempt to run or attack from a distance. He can only be defeated with the use of [[Silverlight]], but it should be noted that normal weapons and spells can still be used to deplete his health bar. The player '''must''' remain in melee distance when finishing him off using Silverlight. On a side note, dependent on one's melee stats, using Silverlight for the entire fight is still a good choice due to its passive damage boost against demonic creatures. Normally, one would assume the last hit must be dealt using Silverlight; however, '''to slay the demon, the player is only required to be in melee distance and wield Silverlight before the demon loses its last hitpoints.''' The easiest way to accomplish this is to switch to manual spell casting at melee range, while wielding Silverlight. If the requirements to finish him off are met, poison damage will also kill Agrith-Naar as if the last hit had been made using Silverlight, making it easier for low combat level accounts and [[pures]] to defeat Agrith-Naar. Alternatively, Agrith-Naar can also be flinched using the standing torch north-west of the centre of the room. ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead|leagueRegion=Desert}} {{DropsLine|name=Vile ashes|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Gallery== Fighting Agrith-Naar.png|The player battles Agrith-Naar Shadow of the Storm - Agrith-Naar dies.png|Agrith-Naar is slain Shadow of the Storm - Sandstorms.png|Agrith-Naar wreaking havoc upon the desert from his own realm ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 25 June 2025 |update = Summer Sweep Up: Combat |change = Agrith-Naar now has a 25% Water weakness. }} {{Subject changes |date = 16 June 2021 |update = A Kingdom Divided |poll = A Kingdom Divided |change = Agrith Naar now drops [[vile ashes]] in place of regular ashes. }} {{Subject changes |date = 29 August 2006 |update = Demons, Dragons and Giants |change = The NPC was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Agrith Naar (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Agrith Naar.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Agrith Naar chathead (historical).png|center]] |[[File:Agrith Naar chathead.png|center]] |- |14 November 2005 –
